title: MCP Security, Prompt Injection, and Supply Chain Trust · Extension Lens: Indirect Injection
summary: Threat-model an MCP server consuming untrusted content and exposing write tools. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext indirect injection increment in an MCP security test suite and operating policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Treat external resource and tool content as untrusted data that cannot redefine authority.
Inspect server provenance, dependencies, update channel, permissions, and data destinations.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
